name_en: [Variant Chip Version] Model: M46839 💯 This OnTheGo BB tote bag features a design inspired by the original, crafted with Monogram canvas and Monogram Reverse canvas for the leather handles and handle attachments. It offers ample space for a phone and includes a detachable and adjustable shoulder strap for carrying options. 18 x 15 x 8.5 cm (Length x Height x Width)
